steps.name: warnings[] contract normalization + contract-change to api-spec §3
Two sub-step approvals + PUT version manual edit + parent lineage (AC5)
Wire remaining tests + verify all Acceptance Criteria

decisions.decision: Task file's 'outline 7 phần' AC1 interpreted as the 7 always-present narrative sections (hook/introduction/problem/solution/demo/conclusion/cta), excluding the 8th 'controversy' field which prompts.md §5 itself defines as optional/nullable ('KHÔNG bịa tranh cãi nếu các nguồn đồng thuận').
decisions.why: docs/specs/prompts.md §5's actual JSON schema has 8 keys; reconciling the task file's '7 phần' wording against the authoritative prompt contract rather than either redesigning the prompt or leaving an unresolved contradiction -- reversible/locally-scoped naming/count judgment call.

decisions.decision: script content gets a new source_outline_version field (in content JSONB, not StepVersion.parent_version) to carry cross-step lineage for AC5.
decisions.why: StepVersion.parent_version (app/models/step_version.py) is intra-step only (used for restore-chain lineage within the same step name) -- there is no existing DB field for 'which outline version was this script generated from'. Adding it inside content avoids a schema migration.
